zh.Cavendish, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可卡文迪什
zh.Wolverley, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾沃爾維利
zh.lifeSummary: Gerard de Limesi是Alan de Limesi的兒子，出生在英國。他於大約1125年與Amicia Bidun在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1185年之前在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Cavendish, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可卡文迪什
zh-hans.Wolverley, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾沃爾維利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gerard de Limesi是Alan de Limesi的儿子，出生在英国。他于大约1125年与Amicia Bidun在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1185年之前在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Limesi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish (Limés): habitational name from Limés in Oviedo province, northern Spain.

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Gerard de Limesi was born in England as the son of Alan de Limesi. He married Amicia Bidun about 1125, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died before 1185, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Gerard de Limesi est né à Angleterre, fils de Alan de Limesi. Il a épousé Amicia Bidun environ 1125, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 1185, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Gerard de Limesi wurde in England, als Sohn von Alan de Limesi geboren. Er hat um 1125 in England Amicia Bidun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb vor 1185 in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Gerard de Limesi è nato il nel England come figlio di Alan de Limesi. Lui sposato Amicia Bidun circa 1125, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 1185, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Pirton, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアピルトン
ja.Cavendish, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクカベンディッシュ
ja.Wolverley, Worcestershire, England: イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルバーリー
ja.lifeSummary: Gerard de LimesiはイギリスでAlan de Limesiの息子として生まれた。約1125年にイギリスでAmicia Bidunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1185年以前にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerard de Limesi(은)는 영국에서 Alan de Limesi의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1125년 영국에서 Amicia Bidun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1185년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gerard de Limesi nasceu em Inglaterra filho de Alan de Limesi. Ele casou-se com Amicia Bidun aproximadamente 1125, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1185, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Gerard de Limesi родился в местности Англия. Его отца звали Alan de Limesi. Он женился на женщине по имени Amicia Bidun около 1125 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер перед 1185 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Gerard de Limesi nació en Inglaterra como hijo de Alan de Limesi. Se casó con Amicia Bidun aproximadamente 1125, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió antes de 1185, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
